title: Expr
description: Represents a textual expression in the Common Expression Language (CEL) syntax. Used for conditional access policies.

expression.description: The CEL expression string. Example: request.time < timestamp("2024-01-01T00:00:00Z").

title.description: An optional title for the expression.

description.description: An optional description of the expression.

location.description: An optional string indicating the location of the expression for error reporting.
